title: Distinguish Limit from Function Value
text: The point where the function is defined can differ from the value the graph approaches nearby.

title: Sketch the Graph Features
text: Draw the horizontal line $$y=2$$, $$then$$ $$place$$ $$the$$ $$open$$ $$circle$$ $$at$$ $$(5,2)$$ and the filled point at $$(5,7)$$. $$This$$ $$helps$$ $$separate$$ $$the$$ $$limit$$ $$from$$ $$the$$ $$actual$$ $$function$$ $$value$$.

title: Read the Nearby Behavior
text: What value does the graph approach from both sides of $$x=5$$?

title: Function Value at the Point
text: The filled point tells you the actual function value at $$x=5$$, $$not$$ $$the$$ $$limit$$.
